channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ashton Jeanty lets his play do the talking for CFP-bound Boise State
item.description: After Ashton Jeanty streaked through the middle of UNLV’s defense on his way to a 75-yard touchdown run Friday night in the Mountain West Conference title game, he didn’t strike the Heisman pose.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: No. 10 Boise State grabs CFP spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 in Mountain West championship
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Ashton Jeanty ran for 209 yards and a touchdown and No. 10 Boise State earned a College Football Playoff spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 on Friday night for its second straight Mountain West title. Boise State (12-1, No.
item.dc:creator: JASON CHATRAW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pitcher Clay Holmes agrees to $38 million, 3-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Clay Holmes and the New York Mets have agreed to a $38 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Archbishop Stepinac basketball team looks to 3-peat as state champs
item.description: WHITE PLAINS, N.Y. (PIX11) -- Archbishop Stepinac in White Plains is the back-to-back state champions, but the team's top player from last season, Boogie Fland, is now playing college basketball at Arkansas. However, that's not stopping the Crusaders from dreaming of a three-peat.
item.dc:creator: Perry Sook, PIX 11

item.title: Golden State Valkyries build roster by taking 11 players in expansion draft, including Kate Martin
item.description: The Golden State Valkyries have selected center Iliana Rupert of Atlanta, guard Veronica Burton of Connecticut, guard Carla Leite of Dallas and forward Maria Conde of Chicago with their initial picks of the WNBA expansion draft.
item.dc:creator: Janie Mccauley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Former Cy Young winner Shane Bieber returning to Cleveland Guardians on 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Shane Bieber is returning to the Cleveland Guardians after making just two starts and undergoing Tommy John surgery last season, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: High school facing student uprising over ban of shirts protesting trans athletes after girls beg for safety
item.description: Students at Martin Luther King High School in Riverside, California, are said to be planning weekly defiance against the school for rules preventing anti-trans shirts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL legend Randy Moss stepping away from ESPN for 'extended time' due to health issues
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Famer Randy Moss is stepping away from ESPN's "Sunday NFL Countdown" due to health issues, ESPN said in a statement on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lionel Messi wins MLS MVP award, the latest trophy on a long list of honors for the Inter Miami star
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — It was a rare instance of Lionel Messi stepping on a soccer field and having no idea what was happening. There they were, more than 250 Inter Miami academy players, a slew of kids lined up at midfield in a formation that spelled out three letters: MVP.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah hires Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff. Former BYU quarterback Jason Beck is expected to be hired as Utah's new offensive coordinator, replacing Andy Ludwig, who resigned in October.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs look to slow down Raiders' star edge rusher Maxx Crosby
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Bucs offensive line has done a solid job in protecting quarterback Baker Mayfield this season, but they're going to have their hands full this weekend when they face off against the Raiders. Las Vegas features one of the top pass rushers in the NFL in Maxx Crosby.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 2024 PPR All 51 Team
item.description: 2024 PPR All 51 Team: Each season our selection committee recognizes the best players from across the county, assembling our "All 51" team. This list includes our first team picks, and honorable mentions.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: McCaffrey injury potentially rules him out for rest of season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil season games, home opener
item.description: (KRON) – The newest Bay Area major pro sports team, the Golden State Valkyries, has announced the date of its inaugural season at the Chase Center on Monday. The inaugural game, slated for May 16 of next year, will be a California battle with the Valkyries facing the Los Angeles Sparks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: CU Buffs await bowl selection
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Buffaloes won't be heading to the Big 12 title game, but they're still sitting comfortably in the AP Top 25 at No. 20. With nine wins, including seven in conference play, it's a season most Buffs fans would call a success. Now, it's a waiting game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Montrose def. Pueblo West 18-7 to advance to the championship game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Montrose Red Hawks are heading to the Class 4A state championship game after defeating the Pueblo West Cyclones 18-7 in a hard-fought semifinal matchup.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WGN 9
